name: Emilie's Tofu Cubes and Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tofu into small cubes.
2. Roll the tofu cubes in sesame seeds and fry in oil until golden on all sides. Use very hot oil and drain on paper towels.
3. In a microwave-safe bowl, dissolve the beef bouillon cubes in 1 cup of water. Pour this mixture into a saucepan.
4. Add soy sauce and cornstarch to the saucepan. Heat while whisking until it thickens to form a dipping sauce.
5. Place half a cup of soy sauce in another bowl for a vegetarian dip.
6. Serve the tofu cubes on a platter with the dipping sauces.
